name: Fenra
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Pack Alpha
uniqueTraits.text: When Fenra knocks out an enemy follower, move a friendly model within 3 hexes of her up to 1 hex. Each model may only be moved once per activation using this trait.

ultimate.name: Call of the Hunt
ultimate.text: Move another model within range up to 3 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Bark at the Moon
plotSkills.text: Followers within range move up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: The Wolf is Loose
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Fenra moves up to 2 hexes towards the target.

clashSkills.name: Feral Bite
clashSkills.text: Target up to 3 models in a single hex. This skill has +1 {damage} for each hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more friendly followers.

clashSkills.name: Shatterstorm
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to 2 followers within range. This skill has +1 {damage} for each hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more friendly followers.

traits.name: Gang Up
traits.text: When a Chainless Cur uses a skill targeting a small follower it gains +3 {accuracy} if there are more followers in the Chainless Cur's hex than in the target's hex.

plotSkills.name: Corner Them
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Place each Chainless Cur within range of the target in a hex adjacent to the target.

clashSkills.name: Snarl
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move each follower model in the target's hex up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Maim and Encircle
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move a Chainless Cur up to 1 hex.
